title: Runescape - Sea Shanty 2 on Super Mario Paint
description:
My Twitter: https://twitter.com/_AxelRude
I stream at: https://mixer.com/axelrod777

The music that plays in Port Sarim, arranged on Super Mario Paint.

I did something I haven't done before for this video in order to include triplets and sixteenth notes in the same measure without using a very fast tempo. I recorded 2 instances of Mario Paint and edited them to play at the same time, with a chroma key effect on the staff background so you can see both at once. I think it's better than using a file that is playing so fast that you cannot follow the notes as they go by, but let me know what you think. 

Download Super Mario Paint: https://github.com/DC37/Super-Mario-Paint/releases
OST: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BJhF0L7pfo8
